title: GLOBE LIFE INC. TO PRESENT AT RAYMOND JAMES 2023 INSTITUTIONAL INVESTORS CONFERENCE
text: MCKINNEY, Texas , Feb. 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) announced today that its Co-Chief Executive Officers Matt Darden and Frank Svoboda and Chief Financial Officer Tom Kalmbach will present Tuesday, March 7, 2023 at the Raymond James 2023 Institutional Investors Conference. Globe Life's presentation is scheduled to begin at 8:40 a.m.

title: Colgate To Declare 60th Year Of Dividend Growth, 10 Companies Boost Annual Dividends
text: The dividend increases continued to come fast and furious in February. Home Depot and Silgan both announced 10%+ increases as Genuine Parts and Walmart extended their dividend growth records.

title: GLOBE LIFE INC. TO PRESENT AT BANK OF AMERICA SECURITIES FINANCIAL SERVICES CONFERENCE 2023
text: MCKINNEY, Texas , Feb. 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Globe Life Inc. (NYSE: GL) announced today that its Co-Chief Executive Officers Matt Darden and Frank Svoboda and Chief Financial Officer Tom Kalmbach will present Tuesday, February 14, 2023 at the Bank of America Securities Financial Services Conference 2023. Globe Life's presentation is scheduled to begin at 3:20 p.m.

title: Globe Life Inc. (GL) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Globe Life Inc. (NYSE:GL ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 2, 2023 10:30 AM ET Company Participants Stephen Mota - Investor Relations Director Frank Svoboda - Co-Chief Executive Officers Matt Darden - Co-Chief Executive Officers Tom Kalmbach - Chief Financial Officer Mike Majors - Chief Strategy Officer Brian Mitchell - General Counsel Conference Call Participants Jimmy Bhullar - J.P. Morgan Erik Bass - Autonomous Research Ryan Krueger - KBW John Barnidge - Piper Sandler Andrew Kligerman - Credit Suisse Mark Hughes - Truist Operator Hello, and welcome to the Globe Life Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Call.

title: Globe Life (GL) Surpasses Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: Globe Life (GL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 2.75% and 0.07%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
